title: Short title
doc_html:
SUBPART J.  LOUISIANA CATFISH MARKETING LAW

§4731.  Short title

This Subpart shall be cited as the "Louisiana Catfish Marketing Law".

Acts 2009, No. 506, §1, eff. Nov. 1, 2009.
